name: Ride & Recharge at Masaar Track, Sharjah - Arada
snippet:
Explore Masaar Track , a 6.6 km cycling track in Sharjah , UAE, perfect for cyclists of all levels with 24/7 access, lighting, underpasses, and a bridge.

name: Masar: Sharjahs latest hub for cycling
snippet: Oct 14, 2024 — The track connects to a 6.4 km network of cycling and running paths throughout the Masar community, resulting in a total length of 13 km. Read more
